typeProperties.script:
source(output(
		Domain as string,
		KeyUoM as string,
		CoA as string,
		ActivityCode as string,
		EarnedQty as double,
		EarnedHrs as double,
		PrevEarnedQty as double,
		PrevEarnedHrs as double,
		VarianceEarnedQty as double,
		VarianceEarnedHrs as double,
		TakeOffQty as double,
		TakeOffHrs as double,
		ProgressBaseQty as double,
		ProgressBaseHrs as double,
		ProgressBaseAmt as double,
		ActualHrs as string,
		ActualAmt as string,
		Phase as string,
		Prime as integer,
		SubPrime as integer,
		CostCode as integer,
		Contract as string,
		UNIT as integer,
		WorkArea as integer,
		SummaryCostType as integer,
		CostType as integer,
		PSRLevel1 as string,
		PSRLevel2 as string,
		PSRL1DESC as string,
		PSRL2DESC as string,
		CoaDesc as string,
		OriginalHrs as double,
		OriginalQty as double,
		OriginalAmt as double,
		Cutoff as string
	),
	useSchema: false,
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	format: 'delimited',
	fileSystem: 'mdr-staging-data',
	folderPath: 'Project_Data/NCSA/MCPM/MCPM_offshore_weekly',
	fileName: 'MCPM_offshorewk_curwk.csv',
	columnDelimiter: ',',
	escapeChar: '\\',
	quoteChar: '\"',
	columnNamesAsHeader: true,
	qutoChar: '\"') ~> StgCurrentWk
source(output(
		Domain as string,
		KeyUoM as string,
		CoA as string,
		ActivityCode as string,
		EarnedQty as double,
		EarnedHrs as double,
		PrevEarnedQty as double,
		PrevEarnedHrs as double,
		VarianceEarnedQty as double,
		VarianceEarnedHrs as double,
		TakeOffQty as double,
		TakeOffHrs as double,
		ProgressBaseQty as double,
		ProgressBaseHrs as double,
		ProgressBaseAmt as double,
		ActualHrs as string,
		ActualAmt as string,
		Phase as string,
		Prime as integer,
		SubPrime as integer,
		CostCode as integer,
		Contract as string,
		UNIT as integer,
		WorkArea as integer,
		SummaryCostType as integer,
		CostType as integer,
		PSRLevel1 as string,
		PSRLevel2 as string,
		PSRL1DESC as string,
		PSRL2DESC as string,
		CoaDesc as string,
		OriginalHrs as double,
		OriginalQty as double,
		OriginalAmt as double,
		Cutoff as string
	),
	useSchema: false,
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	ignoreNoFilesFound: false,
	purgeFiles: true,
	format: 'delimited',
	fileSystem: 'mdr-staging-data',
	folderPath: 'Project_Data/NCSA/MCPM/MCPM_offshore_weekly',
	fileName: 'MCPM_offshorewk_prvwk.csv',
	columnDelimiter: ',',
	escapeChar: '\\',
	quoteChar: '\"',
	columnNamesAsHeader: true,
	qutoChar: '\"') ~> StgPrevWk
StgCurrentWk, StgPrevWk lookup(StgCurrentWk@CoA == StgPrevWk@CoA,
	multiple: false,
	pickup: 'first',
	asc(StgPrevWk@CoA, true),
	broadcast: 'auto')~> lkPrevWkData
lkPrevWkData derive(VarianceActualHrs = iif(isNull(StgCurrentWk@ActualHrs) && isNull(StgPrevWk@ActualHrs),'',toString(round(toDouble(coalesce(StgCurrentWk@ActualHrs,'0'))-toDouble(coalesce(StgPrevWk@ActualHrs,'0')),6))),
		VarianceActualAmt = iif(isNull(StgCurrentWk@ActualAmt) && isNull(StgPrevWk@ActualAmt),'',toString(round(toDouble(coalesce(StgCurrentWk@ActualAmt,'0'))-toDouble(coalesce(StgPrevWk@ActualAmt,'0')),6)))) ~> CalcDelta
CalcDelta sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	partitionFileNames:[(concat('Int_MCPM_offshore_',toString(currentUTC()),'_.csv'))],
	umask: 0022,
	preCommands: [],
	postCommands: [],
	skipDuplicateMapInputs: true,
	skipDuplicateMapOutputs: true,
	mapColumn(
		Domain = StgCurrentWk@Domain,
		KeyUoM = StgCurrentWk@KeyUoM,
		CoA = StgCurrentWk@CoA,
		ActivityCode = StgCurrentWk@ActivityCode,
		EarnedQty = StgCurrentWk@EarnedQty,
		EarnedHrs = StgCurrentWk@EarnedHrs,
		PrevEarnedQty = StgCurrentWk@PrevEarnedQty,
		PrevEarnedHrs = StgCurrentWk@PrevEarnedHrs,
		VarianceEarnedQty = StgCurrentWk@VarianceEarnedQty,
		VarianceEarnedHrs = StgCurrentWk@VarianceEarnedHrs,
		TakeOffQty = StgCurrentWk@TakeOffQty,
		TakeOffHrs = StgCurrentWk@TakeOffHrs,
		ProgressBaseQty = StgCurrentWk@ProgressBaseQty,
		ProgressBaseHrs = StgCurrentWk@ProgressBaseHrs,
		ProgressBaseAmt = StgCurrentWk@ProgressBaseAmt,
		ActualHrs = StgCurrentWk@ActualHrs,
		ActualAmt = StgCurrentWk@ActualAmt,
		Phase = StgCurrentWk@Phase,
		Prime = StgCurrentWk@Prime,
		SubPrime = StgCurrentWk@SubPrime,
		CostCode = StgCurrentWk@CostCode,
		Contract = StgCurrentWk@Contract,
		UNIT = StgCurrentWk@UNIT,
		WorkArea = StgCurrentWk@WorkArea,
		SummaryCostType = StgCurrentWk@SummaryCostType,
		CostType = StgCurrentWk@CostType,
		PSRLevel1 = StgCurrentWk@PSRLevel1,
		PSRLevel2 = StgCurrentWk@PSRLevel2,
		PSRL1DESC = StgCurrentWk@PSRL1DESC,
		PSRL2DESC = StgCurrentWk@PSRL2DESC,
		CoaDesc = StgCurrentWk@CoaDesc,
		OriginalHrs = StgCurrentWk@OriginalHrs,
		OriginalQty = StgCurrentWk@OriginalQty,
		OriginalAmt = StgCurrentWk@OriginalAmt,
		Cutoff = StgCurrentWk@Cutoff,
		VarianceActualHrs,
		VarianceActualAmt
	),
	partitionBy('hash', 1)) ~> StgFinalWk
